textByHash.5e479d8e8de2282dca99315ad40ad32da43767e9: Got anything shiny I can swipe?
textByHash.4cf5e756ae7650cafe2aed6fe26753759b60ca55: It is... How did you know that?
textByHash.9f4869e4640eebb48b9de98b40c54c81b359a675: You wouldn't happen to be talking about... that necklace?
textByHash.e9abf191c2525be46136cb091111971d6632c8bb: A necklace crossed my path a while back, and everything suddenly started to go wrong for me. It was as if I was haunted by some spiteful spirit.
textByHash.d4eb6f3e87909e11f8a231c67fb08cc921927a71: I did what I do best and I flogged it to some chap that came wandering through. He seemed very keen to buy it. Luck's been much better since!
textByHash.21ea6a1eeb0cd497d337745be376afdfbf322f89: He looked like some sort of mountain climber. He said he was setting out on some sort of journey that was very important to him.
textByHash.8fae48f68d206003f2962d860ff108abe1bb8482: Still looking for that necklace? I don't have it any more. I don't want anything to do with it!
